CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, data Array(UInt64));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, emptyArrayUInt64()), (2, [1, 2, 3]), (3, emptyArrayUInt64());
SELECT id, arrayJoin(data) AS flattened_data FROM test_table WHERE data = emptyArrayUInt64();
WITH emptyArrayUInt64() AS empty_array SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE data = empty_array;
SELECT id, data FROM test_table WHERE data != emptyArrayUInt64();
WITH (SELECT emptyArrayUInt64()) AS empty_array_query SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE data = empty_array_query;
CREATE TABLE other_table (ref UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ref;
SELECT t.id, arrayJoin(t.data) AS flattened_data FROM test_table t JOIN other_table o ON t.id = o.ref WHERE t.data = emptyArrayUInt64();
